creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
On 23:24 Mon 18 Feb, Kubilay Kocak wrote:

> Absolutely, though given the backwards incompatible changes introduced,
> I want to be careful all dependent ports will work.
> 
> Can you take the patch as submitted and let me know how you go?

The thing is that software I maintain (devel/py-botocore) requires
py-requests 1.1.0, so I can't be sure if older versions are OK.

I think it make sense to update requests to 1.1.0 at once, instead of
upgrading to 1.0.4. The attached patch to py-requests of version
currently existing in ports tree (0.14.3). It works just fine for me.

-- 
Alexey V. Degtyarev
